title: Codereview pass 1: Missing blank line after SignableDataTooLarge impl before imports
description: In schnorr.rs line 35-36, there's no blank line between `impl core::error::Error for SignableDataTooLarge {}` and the `use curve25519_dalek` import. This is a minor formatting issue but breaks visual separation between the error type definition and unrelated imports.
close_reason: Minor formatting - schnorr.rs formatting already correct in current code
